summary: Iteration 138: Comprehensive testing of Cosmic Mixer revamp. All 18 features tested passed. Per-channel volume faders, waveform selectors, filter sweeps, live waveform visualizer, Master FX Bus with reverb ceiling (60%), Layer Crossfade controls, compressor toggle, Voice Engine with 13 sliders and 8 presets - all verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cosmic Mixer page fully tested at /cosmic-mixer. All accordion sections use data-testid format: accordion-{title-lowercase-with-dashes}. Per-channel faders appear AFTER clicking a frequency/sound/drone to activate it. Fader testids: fader-freq-{hz}, fader-sound-{id}, fader-drone-{id}. Filter testids: filter-sound-{id}, filter-drone-{id}. Waveform selectors: waveform-sine, waveform-triangle, waveform-sawtooth, waveform-square. Master FX Bus has reverb max=60 (ceiling). Compressor toggle at master-compressor-toggle. Layer Crossfade sliders: xfade-freq-sound, xfade-drone-voice.

cosmic_mixer_page.page_loads_at_cosmic_mixer: PASS - Cosmic Mixer page loads at /cosmic-mixer with data-testid='cosmic-mixer-page'
cosmic_mixer_page.waveform_visualizer: PASS - Waveform visualizer canvas exists at data-testid='waveform-visualizer'

world_instruments_section.filter_controls: PASS - filter-drone-sitar-drone appears with cutoff and resonance sliders

master_fx_bus.reverb_ceiling_60: PASS - Master reverb has max=60 (ceiling to prevent muddiness)
